fuente: bet_data_p2 · Cash Flow (excl. Financing) + Balance Sheet Cash

burn_filtros: m_categoria IN (Net Income, Changes in WK, Investing CF)
Excluye Financing CF y Cash BoP
receta.burn_formula: burn = -(Net Income + Changes WK + Investing CF). Positivo = consume cash.
receta.runway_formula: runway = cash actual / promedio de burn ultimos 3 meses
